pr.title: PR #129 â€” Capability File Knowledge Framework v1
pr.description:
## Summary

Adds the first formal **capability-to-file knowledge** layer â€” making capabilities traceable to concrete code assets (files + directories). Builds on identity (Registry #122), memory (Timeline #123), understanding (Summary #125), relationships (#127), and meaning (Impact #128): where impact answers *what changed*, this answers *where it lives*.

New module `axiom_core/capability_file_knowledge.py` follows the same deterministic, append-only, evidence-bundle pattern as #122â€“#128. It is structure-only â€” no graph engine/queries, no repository scanning, no automatic file discovery, no visualization, no network calls. Registry/Relationship/GitHub-Import layers are consumed read-only; nothing is mutated.

**Models**
- `CapabilityFileReference` (capability_id, file_path, file_name, file_extension) â€” derived per unique `(capability_id, file_path)`
- `CapabilityFileRelationship` (capability_id, file_path, relationship_type, summary); type âˆˆ {CREATED, MODIFIED, VALIDATED, TESTED, DEPENDS_ON, REFERENCES}
- `CapabilityFileKnowledge` â€” per-capability aggregate (file_count, relationship_count, affected_directories, raw_payload, schema_version)
- `CapabilityFileKnowledgeReport` (capability_count, file_count, relationship_count, directory_count, relationship_type_counts, + `duplicate_relationship_count`)
- `CapabilityFileKnowledgeEvidence` + `CapabilityFileKnowledgeEngine`

**Determinism / behavior**
- Relationships sorted by `(capability_id, file_path, relationship_type, relationship_id)`; references by `(capability_id, file_path, file_reference_id)`; knowledge by `capability_id` â€” fully input-independent.
- **File normalization**: `\` â†’ `/`, strip whitespace, drop leading `./` and redundant separators; `file_name`/`file_extension` derived via `PurePosixPath`. File paths are treated as *data* â€” `..` is preserved as a literal segment, never used for filesystem access (only `report_id` is path-safety validated).
- **Duplicate detection**: a duplicate is the same `(capability_id, normalized file_path, relationship_type)` (case-insensitive type); duplicates are deduped, counted (`duplicate_relationship_count`), and cause `passed:false` â€” mirrors #127.
- **Directory aggregation**: `affected_directories` = sorted unique parent dirs, per-capability and report-wide; `directory_count` over the report.
- `pass_fail.json` `passed = relationship_count > 0 and duplicate_relationship_count == 0`.
- Types normalized to uppercase + validated; `capability_id`+`file_path`+`relationship_type` required; raw_payload (per-capability via `knowledge_payloads`) + report `raw_metadata` preserved verbatim.

**CLI** (`axiom_cli/main.py`): `capability-file-create --file-file` / `capability-files` / `capability-file-show <id>` / `capability-file-export <id> --format markdown|json|csv`. Rich renderer escapes bracketed tokens so `[CREATED]`/`[cap-122]` render literally. Error paths: not-found â†’ exit 2, traversal/invalid â†’ exit 1.

**Evidence bundle** under `artifacts/capability_file_knowledge/<run_id>/`: `capability_file_request.json`, `capability_file_result.json`, `capability_file_summary.md`, `pass_fail.json` (+ `report.json`).

**Wiring**: registered 4 commands in `runner/command_registry.py` (READ_ONLY/SAFE); added moduleâ†’test mapping in `test_selection_engine.py`; added the 4 commands to `EXPECTED_AXIOM_COMMANDS`; gitignored the artifacts dir.

## Validation
- `poetry run pytest -q` â†’ **4264 passed, 1 skipped** (+51; baseline 4213 at #128)
- `poetry run ruff check src/ tests/` â†’ **0 errors**
- CLI smoke: backslash + `./` normalization, case-insensitive duplicate dedupe (`duplicate_relationship_count=1`), directory aggregation, deterministic ordering, all 3 export formats, not-foundâ†’exit 2, traversalâ†’exit 1

Revit 2024 baseline unaffected (Python CLI/framework only).

Link to Devin session: https://app.devin.ai/sessions/8ad1c9ac0d2f4252bb77647f1eabaac7
Requested by: @plamen-dev
